## Snapshot Deployment *(optional)*

```text
deploy.name: <required>
```
-->

<!--
Replace the placeholder values to enable a snapshot deployment.
The deployment is only considered if the pull request has the `snapshot-deploy` label applied.

The deployed version will be:
<version>-<deploy.name>-SNAPSHOT

deploy.name
  Required. Appended to the base snapshot version.
-->
